class.name: AREnvironmentProbeAnchor
class.brief_description: An anchor that captures environment lighting for realistic reflections.
class.description: Represents a captured environment texture probe at a specific location and extent. Generated automatically when [code]environmentTexturing[/code] is set to [code]AUTOMATIC[/code] on the configuration. [b]iOS only.[/b] On visionOS and macOS, this type exists for API consistency but is never populated with real data.

members.member: The size of the region covered by this environment probe.
Whether the probe currently contains a captured environment texture.
A unique identifier for this environment probe anchor.
The height of the captured environment texture in pixels.
The width of the captured environment texture in pixels.
The probe transform in world space.
